subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who standeth alone in majesty, Who is unique in grandeur, Who is sanctified above all that the people have uttered, and exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد بالعزه و توحد بالعظمه و تقدس عما تفوه به البریه و تنزه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
